email_text: I noticed an unfamiliar charge on my latest invoice labeled 'premium support' but I never signed up for that.
good_response_traits: Investigate the charge, verify subscription status, offer refund if error

email_text: My application's environment variables aren't loading correctly after the last deployment on App Platform.
good_response_traits: Ask for deployment logs, check env var configuration, suggest redeployment

email_text: I need to recover my account but I no longer have access to my phone for 2FA codes.
good_response_traits: Explain 2FA recovery process, verify identity through alternative means

email_text: What monitoring and observability tools come built into the platform?
good_response_traits: List built-in monitoring features, mention third-party integrations

email_text: I downgraded my plan last month but my bill hasn't changed. When does the new pricing take effect?
good_response_traits: Explain billing cycle and proration, verify plan change was processed

email_text: My cron job on the server stopped executing after a system update. The crontab file looks correct.
good_response_traits: Check cron service status, review system logs, verify permissions

email_text: How do I add a new team member with read-only access to specific projects?
good_response_traits: Explain team roles and project-level permissions, provide invitation steps

email_text: Do you support deploying applications written in Rust?
good_response_traits: Confirm Rust support options, mention Dockerized deployment, link to examples

email_text: I got charged a late fee but my payment was only one day overdue due to a bank holiday.
good_response_traits: Acknowledge the situation, review late fee policy, consider waiving the fee

email_text: DNS propagation for my custom domain has been stuck for over 48 hours. The records show as configured correctly.
good_response_traits: Check DNS records, verify nameserver configuration, suggest TTL adjustment

email_text: I want to merge two separate accounts that I accidentally created under different email addresses.
good_response_traits: Explain account merge limitations, suggest manual resource transfer process

email_text: What happens to my data if I exceed my storage quota?
good_response_traits: Explain storage quota policy, describe warnings and enforcement actions

email_text: My credit card was compromised and I need to make sure no unauthorized charges were made on my account.
good_response_traits: Prioritize security, help review recent charges, suggest updating payment method

email_text: The WebSocket connections on my app keep dropping after exactly 60 seconds.
good_response_traits: Check proxy timeout settings, review load balancer configuration, suggest keepalive

email_text: Can I download a complete export of all my account data for compliance purposes?
good_response_traits: Explain data export capabilities, mention GDPR/compliance tools, provide steps

email_text: How do your managed databases compare to self-hosted databases in terms of performance?
good_response_traits: Compare managed vs self-hosted, highlight maintenance benefits, discuss performance characteristics

email_text: I signed up for annual billing but want to switch to monthly. Will I get a prorated refund?
good_response_traits: Explain billing switch policy, describe proration calculation, process the change

email_text: My serverless function is hitting cold start times of over 10 seconds. How can I reduce this?
good_response_traits: Suggest provisioned concurrency, review function size, optimize dependencies

email_text: I need to rotate all API keys associated with my account after a security audit recommendation.
good_response_traits: Provide API key rotation steps, warn about active integrations, suggest gradual rollover

email_text: What certifications does your platform hold for data security and compliance?
good_response_traits: List security certifications (SOC 2, ISO 27001, etc.), link to compliance page
